title: Saudi Arabian Ikura Biryani
description: A flavorful and aromatic rice dish from Saudi Arabia, featuring the delicate taste of ikura and the spiciness of biryani. This dish is perfect for a special occasion or a dinner party.

ingredients.name: Saudi Arabian Saffron
ingredients.notes: threads, soaked in 1 tbsp hot water

instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the fried onions and cook until lightly browned.
Add the Arabian Basmati Rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the Fantastic Spice Blend and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and fluffy.
Fluff the rice with a fork and stir in the soaked saffron threads.
Transfer the rice to a serving platter or individual plates.
Top with ikura and garnish with chopped cilantro.
